final_prompt.prompt:
Design a marketing poster for a domestic Chinese fundraising roadshow announcing GPT-5.5, featuring speaker Sam Altman.

Style/medium: corporate presentation cover, Chinese tech roadshow aesthetic blending Silicon Valley credibility with domestic VC sensibilities, clean modern layout
Composition: centered layout with generous whitespace, professional headshot placement zone, hierarchical text blocks for event title and speaker name
Subject: GPT-5.5 product launch announcement, speaker Sam Altman (奥特曼), Chinese domestic fundraising context
Scene/backdrop: minimal gradient or abstract tech-inspired background, subtle neural network or data flow patterns, no clutter
Lighting/mood: professional corporate atmosphere, confident and forward-looking, trustworthy tech leadership tone
Color palette: deep blue or tech navy as primary, white for text contrast, subtle gold or accent color for premium feel
Text (verbatim): "GPT-5.5发布" "奥特曼"
Constraints: must work as PowerPoint cover slide (16:9 ratio); text must be legible when projected; balance Western tech credibility with Chinese market familiarity
Avoid: generic stock photos; overly decorative Chinese motifs; cluttered layouts; American-centric visual language; gradients that reduce text readability
